headline: Stable negative sentiment (score: -74.6)
key_insights: Optimism trending up 42% over 7 days (strong momentum)
sentiment_commentary:
• Frustrations dominate with 177 quotes, including 138 at strong intensity - people are expressing serious anger and dissatisfaction today.
• The frustration score of 63.4 sits in the lower-middle range historically but represents a notable jump from yesterday's 42.6.
• Both fears and optimism remain well below average, with fears recovering somewhat from yesterday's deeper negative territory.
methodology: See METHODOLOGY.md. Scores use z-score normalization with empirically-derived intensity weights from analytics_config.yaml. Alerts at |z| >= threshold (configurable, default 2.0 for p < 0.05).
